# WeBot Studio

> WeBot Studio is the checkout, intake, dashboard, and review surface for WeBot Agency agent jobs.

Canonical site: https://webot.studio/
Agency site: https://webot.agency/

## Main Pages

- [Studio homepage](https://webot.studio/): Agent family chooser, checkout path, dashboard demo, and human test desk.
- [Agent jobs](https://webot.studio/agent-jobs.html): Reviewed AI agent job categories and delivery model.
- [Pricing](https://webot.studio/pricing.html): Starter, Plus, Business, and one-time reviewed job pricing.

## What customers can buy

- Starter monthly access: $49/mo for one focused active project path.
- Plus monthly access: $149/mo for more recurring personal or business work.
- Business monthly access: $399/mo for concurrent projects, dashboard history, and workflow setup.
- Small one-time reviewed job: $49 for one small scoped deliverable.
- Standard one-time reviewed job: $129 for one fuller deliverable with more source material or formatting.
- Deep one-time reviewed job: $299 for deeper research, heavier cleanup, complex build help, or larger reviewed output.

## Agent families

- Plan & Itinerary: vacations, date nights, business get-togethers, road trips, route timing, reservation notes, and backup plans.
- Gather & Extract: scraping, OCR, PDFs, tables, lead lists, invoices, and messy source cleanup.
- Create & Polish: social posts, cards, wishes, story work, tone rewrites, logos, and business cards.
- Build & Automate: code, spreadsheets, formulas, automations, and agent runbooks.
- Review & Decide: research, comparisons, business summaries, second opinions, and quality reviews.

## Dashboard path

Paid customer work moves through payment + intake, agent route, agent draft, lead review, fresh-context review, customer approval, and complete delivery.

## Google Search Setup

The canonical sitemap is https://webot.studio/sitemap.xml. Search Console verification and sitemap submission require access to the verified Google property; do not claim submission until Search Console confirms it.
